title: calamintha corsica
intro: Calamintha corsica, also known as Corsican mint or blue melissa, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Calamintha corsica include its ability to ease digestive issues, relieve stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, headaches, and insomnia.
